Package io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.spring.core.converters

Class MissingServletRequestPartExceptionConstraintErrorConverter

java.lang.Object
io.github.lengors.scoutdesk.domain.spring.core.converters.MissingServletRequestPartExceptionConstraintErrorConverter
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter<org.springframework.web.multipart.support.MissingServletRequestPartException,ConstraintError>
@Component public class MissingServletRequestPartExceptionConstraintErrorConverter extends Object implements org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter<org.springframework.web.multipart.support.MissingServletRequestPartException,ConstraintError>
Converts a MissingServletRequestPartException into a ConstraintError. This converter is designed to handle cases where a required multipart request part is missing, and provides a constraint error with a message indicating the missing field name.

The conversion logic extracts the name of the missing request part from the exception and creates a ConstraintError instance with a formatted message.

This component is registered as a Spring Component and implements the Converter interface for the types MissingServletRequestPartException and ConstraintError.

    Field
    Description
    static final String
    MESSAGE
    A constant string template used to indicate a missing field in a multipart request.

  • Field Details

    • MESSAGE

      public static final String MESSAGE
      A constant string template used to indicate a missing field in a multipart request. The placeholder "%s" within the string is intended to be replaced with the specific name of the missing field.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Method Details

    • convert

      public ConstraintError convert(@NotNull @NotNull org.springframework.web.multipart.support.MissingServletRequestPartException source)
      Converts a MissingServletRequestPartException into a ConstraintError. This method is used to handle cases where a required multipart request part is missing. It creates a ConstraintError object with a property indicating the missing field name and a corresponding error message.
      Specified by:
      convert in interface org.springframework.core.convert.converter.Converter<org.springframework.web.multipart.support.MissingServletRequestPartException,ConstraintError>
      Parameters:
      source - the MissingServletRequestPartException instance representing the missing multipart request part
      Returns:
      a ConstraintError instance containing the missing field name and an error message
